untranslatable_reason: Double top pattern detection requires price peak identification and structural pattern recognition not available in indicator set. U-shaped volume profile and relative volume comparison between two specific peaks cannot be expressed with allowed indicators. The signal requires pattern-level analysis (identifying two peaks at similar levels, measuring their relationship, and validating U-shaped volume between them) which exceeds point-in-time indicator capabilities.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture core SHORT bias after uptrend using price above SMA and elevated volume as proxy indicators. However, the true EEDT pattern requires identifying two consecutive peaks with similar heights, validating the intervening valley, and confirming U-shaped volume concentration—none of which can be reliably expressed with the allowed indicator set. A custom pattern detector or structural price analysis module would be needed for proper implementation.
